Parameter: Mention 5 Major Diseases and Severity (Low, Medium, High)
Groundnut: Tikka Leaf Spot (High), Rust (High), Stem Rot (Medium), Bud Necrosis (Medium), Root Rot (Low)
Sunflower: Alternaria Blight (High), Rust (Medium), Downy Mildew (Medium), Charcoal Rot (Medium), Head Rot (Medium)
Castor: Wilt (High), Botrytis Gray Mold (High), Seedling Blight (Medium), Bacterial Leaf Spot (Low), Alternaria Blight (Medium)
Mustard: Alternaria Blight (High), White Rust (High), Downy Mildew (Medium), Powdery Mildew (Medium), Sclerotinia Stem Rot (Medium)
Sesame: Phyllody (High), Macrophomina Root Rot (High), Alternaria Leaf Spot (Medium), Bacterial Leaf Spot (Low), Phytophthora Blight (Medium)

Parameter: Nutrient (Mineral) Deficiencies and Their Associated Syndrome
Groundnut: Ca: Pops (empty pods) or blackened plumule; N: Light green leaves; P: Dark green/purple; B: Hollow heart
Sunflower: B: Hollow/chaffy seeds or brittle heads; N: General yellowing; P: Small dark leaves
Castor: Mg: Interveinal chlorosis on older leaves; N: Pale leaves; S: Yellowing of young leaves
Mustard: S: Cupped/small leaves with yellowing; N: Yellowing of older leaves; B: Cracking of stems
Sesame: N: Pale leaves; P: Stunted; Zn: Reduced leaf size
